message:
feat(core): add FTS5 virtual table creation, MATCH operator routing, and explicit INSERT rowid support

Three interconnected features that complete virtual table write support:

1. FTS5 CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE option parsing (fsqlite-ext-fts5):
   - Parse tokenize, content, contentless_delete, secure_delete, prefix,
     detail, columnsize, and insttoken options from CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE args
   - Handle quoted values (single, double, backtick) via unquote_fts_arg()
   - Strip UNINDEXED and collation hints from column declarations
   - Reject unknown options with clear error messages
   - Default to "content" column and "unicode61" tokenizer when unspecified
   - Tests: option application and unknown option rejection

2. Connection statement routing (fsqlite-core/connection.rs):
   - Add Statement::CreateVirtualTable variant to statement classification,
     concurrent-mutation guard, and dispatch switch
   - Route queries containing MATCH operators through fallback evaluation
     path since the VDBE path does not yet support MATCH/REGEXP in the
     main connection dispatch

3. INSERT codegen: explicit rowid column handling (fsqlite-vdbe/codegen.rs):
   - Detect rowid/_rowid_/oid aliases in INSERT column lists via
     is_rowid_alias() instead of mapping them through build_column_map()
   - Emit three-way rowid determination: explicit rowid expression >
     INTEGER PRIMARY KEY column value > auto-generated NewRowid
   - Remove build_column_map() helper, inlining column resolution to
     handle the rowid alias case without special-casing the map
   - Pass explicit_rowids slice through codegen_insert_values() for
     per-row rowid expression evaluation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
